Yintii

Inspired by TinyUrl, Yintii is a URL shortener so you can provide your friends, clients, and tweets with a sleek and short url. Built with Ruby on Rails.

Visit Website View on Github

Fang Gang

A website for FangGang, a Web3 brand and NFT collection on the Ethereum blockchain.

Visit Website View on Github

Poetry By Robots

Poetry By Robots is a NFT collection on the Ethereum block chain. Utilizing GPT-3 and DALLE, I created a collection of combination poems and paintings. They are still available today but the roadmap is canceled.

Visit Website View on Github View on Etherscan

React Tug of War (Twitch Chat Game)

This is a tug of war game you can play on Twitch.tv - it is hooked up to the streamers chat feed, and viewers can say 'right' or 'r' and 'left' or 'l' to pull the flag a certain way.

Visit Website View on Github

LilDegens Minting page and Smart Contract

LilDegens is an NFT project on the Ethereum Blockchain. This website serves as the main miniting page. I also developed the smart contract for the collection.

Visit Website View on Github View on Etherscan
